title: Brooklyn
overview: An Irishwoman in 1950s New York is torn between two countries and two loves.

title: Master and Commander: The Far Side of the World
overview: A British frigate captain pursues a French privateer during the Napoleonic Wars.

title: The Perfect Storm
overview: A Gloucester swordfishing crew is caught in the storm of the century.

title: In the Heart of the Sea
overview: The whaleship Essex is attacked by a great white whale in 1820.

title: Captain Phillips
overview: A container ship captain is taken hostage by Somali pirates.

title: Kon-Tiki
overview: Thor Heyerdahl crosses the Pacific on a balsa raft in 1947.

title: The Lighthouse
overview: Two lighthouse keepers descend into madness on a remote New England isle.

title: The Guard
overview: An unorthodox Irish policeman teams with an FBI agent against drug smugglers.

title: Calvary
overview: A good priest in a seaside Irish town is threatened during confession.

title: The Wind That Shakes the Barley
overview: Two brothers join the IRA during the Irish War of Independence.

title: The Field
overview: An Irish farmer's fierce attachment to rented land turns to tragedy.

title: The Secret of Roan Inish
overview: A girl on the Donegal coast uncovers her family's selkie legend.

title: Ondine
overview: An Irish fisherman hauls up a woman in his net who may be a selkie.

title: Moby Dick
overview: Captain Ahab hunts the white whale across the oceans.

title: Ryan's Daughter
overview: A married Irishwoman's affair scandalises her village in 1916.

title: The Banshees of Inisherin
overview: A friendship abruptly ends on a remote Irish island in 1923.

title: Song of the Sea
overview: An Irish boy and his selkie sister journey through myth to save the spirit world.

title: Leviathan
overview: An immersive documentary aboard a North Atlantic fishing trawler.

title: The Old Man and the Sea
overview: An aging Cuban fisherman battles a giant marlin far out to sea.

title: Whale Rider
overview: A Maori girl fights to claim her destiny as her people's leader.

title: Fisherman's Friends
overview: A boy band manager signs a group of Cornish fishermen who sing sea shanties.

title: The North Water
overview: A surgeon joins a doomed Arctic whaling voyage in 1859.
